title: GitHub - langchain-ai/open_deep_research
excerpt: Contribute to langchain-ai/open_deep_research development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
🔬 Open Deep Research

Deep research has broken out as one of the most popular agent applications. This is a simple, configurable, fully open source deep research agent that works across many model providers, search tools, and MCP servers. It's performance is on par with many popular deep research agents (see Deep Research Bench leaderboard).

🔥 Recent Updates

August 14, 2025: See our free course here (and course repo here) on building open deep research.

August 7, 2025: Added GPT-5 and updated the Deep Research Bench evaluation w/ GPT-5 results.

August 2, 2025: Achieved #6 ranking on the Deep Research Bench Leaderboard with an overall score of 0.4344.

July 30, 2025: Read about the evolution from our original implementations to the current version in our blog post.

July 16, 2025: Read more in our blog and watch our video for a quick overview.

🚀 Quickstart

  1. Clone the repository and activate a virtual environment:
git clone https://github.com/langchain-ai/open_deep_research.git
cd open_deep_research
uv venv
source .venv/bin/activate  # On Windows: .venv\Scripts\activate
  1. Install dependencies:
uv sync
# or
uv pip install -r pyproject.toml
  1. Set up your .env file to customize the environment variables (for model selection, search tools, and other configuration settings):
cp .env.example .env
  1. Launch agent with the LangGraph server locally:
# Install dependencies and start the LangGraph server
uvx --refresh --from "langgraph-cli[inmem]" --with-editable . --python 3.11 langgraph dev --allow-blocking

This will open the LangGraph Studio UI in your browser.

- 🚀 API: http://127.0.0.1:2024
- 🎨 Studio UI: https://smith.langchain.com/studio/?baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:2024
- 📚 API Docs: http://127.0.0.1:2024/docs

Ask a question in the messages input field and click Submit. Select different configuration in the "Manage Assistants" tab.

⚙️ Configurations

LLM 🧠

Open Deep Research supports a wide range of LLM providers via the init_chat_model() API. It uses LLMs for a few different tasks. See the below model fields in the configuration.py file for more details. This can be accessed via the LangGraph Studio UI.

  • Summarization (default: openai:gpt-4.1-mini): Summarizes search API results
  • Research (default: openai:gpt-4.1): Power the search agent
  • Compression (default: openai:gpt-4.1): Compresses research findings
  • Final Report Model (default: openai:gpt-4.1): Write the final report

Note: the selected model will need to support structured outputs and tool calling.

Note: For OpenRouter: Follow this guide and for local models via Ollama see setup instructions.

Search API 🔍

Open Deep Research supports a wide range of search tools. By default it uses the Tavily search API. Has full MCP compatibility and work native web search for Anthropic and OpenAI. See the search_api and mcp_config fields in the configuration.py file for more details. This can be accessed via the LangGraph Studio UI.

Other

See the fields in the configuration.py for various other settings to customize the behavior of Open Deep Research.

📊 Evaluation

Open Deep Research is configured for evaluation with Deep Research Bench. This benchmark has 100 PhD-level research tasks (50 English, 50 Chinese), crafted by domain experts across 22 fields (e.g., Science & Tech, Business & Finance) to mirror real-world deep-research needs. It has 2 evaluation metrics, but the leaderboard is based on the RACE score. This uses LLM-as-a-judge (Gemini) to evaluate research reports against a golden set of reports compiled by experts across a set of metrics.

Usage

Warning: Running across the 100 examples can cost ~$20-$100 depending on the model selection.

The dataset is available on LangSmith via this link. To kick off evaluation, run the following command:

# Run comprehensive evaluation on LangSmith datasets
python tests/run_evaluate.py

This will provide a link to a LangSmith experiment, which will have a name YOUR_EXPERIMENT_NAME. Once this is done, extract the results to a JSONL file that can be submitted to the Deep Research Bench.

python tests/extract_langsmith_data.py --project-name "YOUR_EXPERIMENT_NAME" --model-name "you-model-name" --dataset-name "deep_research_bench"

This creates tests/expt_results/deep_research_bench_model-name.jsonl with the required format. Move the generated JSONL file to a local clone of the Deep Research Bench repository and follow their Quick Start guide for evaluation submission.

Results

Name Commit Summarization Research Compression Total Cost Total Tokens RACE Score Experiment
GPT-5 ca3951d openai:gpt-4.1-mini openai:gpt-5 openai:gpt-4.1 204,640,896 0.4943 Link
Defaults 6532a41 openai:gpt-4.1-mini openai:gpt-4.1 openai:gpt-4.1 $45.98 58,015,332 0.4309 Link
Claude Sonnet 4 f877ea9 openai:gpt-4.1-mini anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-20250514 openai:gpt-4.1 $187.09 138,917,050 0.4401 Link
Deep Research Bench Submission c0a160b openai:gpt-4.1-nano openai:gpt-4.1 openai:gpt-4.1 $87.83 207,005,549 0.4344 Link

🚀 Deployments and Usage

LangGraph Studio

Follow the quickstart to start LangGraph server locally and test the agent out on LangGraph Studio.

Hosted deployment

You can easily deploy to LangGraph Platform.

Open Agent Platform

Open Agent Platform (OAP) is a UI from which non-technical users can build and configure their own agents. OAP is great for allowing users to configure the Deep Researcher with different MCP tools and search APIs that are best suited to their needs and the problems that they want to solve.

We've deployed Open Deep Research to our public demo instance of OAP. All you need to do is add your API Keys, and you can test out the Deep Researcher for yourself! Try it out here

You can also deploy your own instance of OAP, and make your own custom agents (like Deep Researcher) available on it to your users.

  1. Deploy Open Agent Platform
  2. Add Deep Researcher to OAP

Legacy Implementations 🏛️

The src/legacy/ folder contains two earlier implementations that provide alternative approaches to automated research. They are less performant than the current implementation, but provide alternative ideas understanding the different approaches to deep research.

1. Workflow Implementation (legacy/graph.py)

  • Plan-and-Execute: Structured workflow with human-in-the-loop planning
  • Sequential Processing: Creates sections one by one with reflection
  • Interactive Control: Allows feedback and approval of report plans
  • Quality Focused: Emphasizes accuracy through iterative refinement

2. Multi-Agent Implementation (legacy/multi_agent.py)

  • Supervisor-Researcher Architecture: Coordinated multi-agent system
  • Parallel Processing: Multiple researchers work simultaneously
  • Speed Optimized: Faster report generation through concurrency
  • MCP Support: Extensive Model Context Protocol integration

sentences.en: 🚀 Deployments and Usage

sentences.en: LangGraph Studio

blocks.html_en: Follow the quickstart to start LangGraph server locally and test the agent out on LangGraph Studio.

sentences.en: Follow the quickstart to start LangGraph server locally and test the agent out on LangGraph Studio.
sentences.zh: 按照快速入门在本地启动 LangGraph 服务器并在 LangGraph Studio 上测试代理。

sentences.en: Hosted deployment
sentences.zh: 托管部署

blocks.html_en: You can easily deploy to LangGraph Platform.

sentences.en: You can easily deploy to LangGraph Platform.
sentences.zh: 您可以轻松部署到 LangGraph 平台。

sentences.en: Open Agent Platform
sentences.zh: 开放代理平台

blocks.html_en: Open Agent Platform (OAP) is a UI from which non-technical users can build and configure their own agents. OAP is great for allowing users to configure the Deep Researcher with different MCP tools and search APIs that are best suited to their needs and the problems that they want to solve.

sentences.en: Open Agent Platform (OAP) is a UI from which non-technical users can build and configure their own agents.
sentences.zh: 开放代理平台 (OAP) 是一个 UI，非技术用户可以从中构建和配置自己的代理。

sentences.en: OAP is great for allowing users to configure the Deep Researcher with different MCP tools and search APIs that are best suited to their needs and the problems that they want to solve.
sentences.zh: OAP 非常适合允许用户使用最适合他们的需求和想要解决的问题的不同 MCP 工具和搜索 API 来配置 Deep Researcher。

blocks.html_en: We've deployed Open Deep Research to our public demo instance of OAP. All you need to do is add your API Keys, and you can test out the Deep Researcher for yourself! Try it out here

sentences.en: We've deployed Open Deep Research to our public demo instance of OAP.
sentences.zh: 我们已将 Open Deep Research 部署到 OAP 的公共演示实例中。

sentences.en: All you need to do is add your API Keys, and you can test out the Deep Researcher for yourself!
sentences.zh: 您所需要做的就是添加您的 API 密钥，然后您就可以亲自测试 Deep Researcher！

sentences.en: Try it out here
sentences.zh: 在这里尝试一下

blocks.html_en: You can also deploy your own instance of OAP, and make your own custom agents (like Deep Researcher) available on it to your users.

sentences.en: You can also deploy your own instance of OAP, and make your own custom agents (like Deep Researcher) available on it to your users.
sentences.zh: 您还可以部署您自己的 OAP 实例，并为您的用户提供您自己的自定义代理（如 Deep Researcher）。

sentences.en: Deploy Open Agent Platform
sentences.zh: 部署开放代理平台

sentences.en: Legacy Implementations 🏛️
sentences.zh: 遗留实施🏛️

blocks.html_en: The src/legacy/ folder contains two earlier implementations that provide alternative approaches to automated research. They are less performant than the current implementation, but provide alternative ideas understanding the different approaches to deep research.

sentences.en: The src/legacy/ folder contains two earlier implementations that provide alternative approaches to automated research.
sentences.zh: src/legacy/ 文件夹包含两个早期的实现，它们提供了自动化研究的替代方法。

sentences.en: They are less performant than the current implementation, but provide alternative ideas understanding the different approaches to deep research.
sentences.zh: 它们的性能不如当前的实现，但提供了理解深度研究的不同方法的替代想法。

sentences.en: Workflow Implementation (legacy/graph.py)

sentences.en: Plan-and-Execute: Structured workflow with human-in-the-loop planning
sentences.zh: 规划和执行：具有人机参与规划的结构化工作流程

blocks.html_en: • Sequential Processing: Creates sections one by one with reflection

sentences.en: Sequential Processing: Creates sections one by one with reflection
sentences.zh: 顺序处理：通过反射逐个创建部分

blocks.html_en: • Interactive Control: Allows feedback and approval of report plans

sentences.en: Interactive Control: Allows feedback and approval of report plans
sentences.zh: 交互控制：允许反馈和批准报告计划

blocks.html_en: • Quality Focused: Emphasizes accuracy through iterative refinement

sentences.en: Quality Focused: Emphasizes accuracy through iterative refinement
sentences.zh: 注重质量：通过迭代细化强调准确性

sentences.en: Multi-Agent Implementation (legacy/multi_agent.py)
sentences.zh: 多代理实现 (legacy/multi_agent.py)

sentences.en: Supervisor-Researcher Architecture: Coordinated multi-agent system
sentences.zh: 主管-研究员架构：协调的多智能体系统

sentences.en: Parallel Processing: Multiple researchers work simultaneously
sentences.zh: 并行处理：多个研究人员同时工作

blocks.html_en: • Speed Optimized: Faster report generation through concurrency

sentences.en: Speed Optimized: Faster report generation through concurrency
sentences.zh: 速度优化：通过并发更快地生成报告

blocks.html_en: • MCP Support: Extensive Model Context Protocol integration

sentences.en: MCP Support: Extensive Model Context Protocol integration
sentences.zh: MCP 支持：广泛的模型上下文协议集成

content_html_zh:
🔬 开放深度研究

深度研究已成为最流行的代理应用程序之一。 这是一个简单、可配置、完全开源的深度研究代理，可跨许多模型提供者、搜索工具和 MCP 服务器工作。 它的性能与许多流行的深度研究代理相当（请参阅深度研究基准排行榜）。

🔥 最近更新

2025 年 8 月 14 日：请在此处查看我们关于构建开放式深度研究的免费课程（以及此处的课程存储库）。

2025 年 8 月 7 日：添加了 GPT-5 并更新了 Deep Research Bench 评估和 GPT-5 结果。

2025 年 8 月 2 日：在 Deep Research Bench 排行榜上排名第 6，总分 0.4344。

2025 年 7 月 30 日：在我们的博客文章中了解从原始实现到当前版本的演变。

2025 年 7 月 16 日：在我们的博客中阅读更多内容并观看我们的视频以快速了解。

🚀 快速入门

  1. 克隆存储库并激活虚拟环境：
git clone https://github.com/langchain-ai/open_deep_research.git
cd open_deep_research
uv venv
source .venv/bin/activate  # On Windows: .venv\Scripts\activate
  1. 安装依赖项：
uv sync
# or
uv pip install -r pyproject.toml
  1. 设置 .env 文件以自定义环境变量（用于模型选择、搜索工具和其他配置设置）：
cp .env.example .env
  1. 在本地启动具有 LangGraph 服务器的代理：
# Install dependencies and start the LangGraph server
uvx --refresh --from "langgraph-cli[inmem]" --with-editable . --python 3.11 langgraph dev --allow-blocking

这将在浏览器中打开 LangGraph Studio UI。

- 🚀 API: http://127.0.0.1:2024
- 🎨 Studio UI: https://smith.langchain.com/studio/?baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:2024
- 📚 API Docs: http://127.0.0.1:2024/docs

在消息输入字段中提出问题，然后单击“提交”。 在“管理助手”选项卡中选择不同的配置。

⚙️ 配置

LLM 🧠

Open Deep Research 通过 init_chat_model() API 支持各种 LLM 提供商。 它使用法学硕士来完成一些不同的任务。 有关更多详细信息，请参阅configuration.py 文件中的以下模型字段。 这可以通过 LangGraph Studio UI 访问。

  • 汇总（默认：openai:gpt-4.1-mini）：汇总搜索 API 结果
  • 研究（默认：openai:gpt-4.1）：为搜索代理提供动力
  • 压缩（默认：openai:gpt-4.1）：压缩研究结果
  • 最终报告模型（默认：openai:gpt-4.1）：编写最终报告
注意：所选模型需要支持结构化输出和工具调用。
注意：对于 OpenRouter：请遵循本指南，对于通过 Ollama 的本地型号，请参阅设置说明。

搜索 API 🔍

Open Deep Research 支持多种搜索工具。 默认情况下，它使用 Tavily 搜索 API。 具有完整的 MCP 兼容性，并可用于 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 的本机网络搜索。 有关更多详细信息，请参阅configuration.py 文件中的search_api 和mcp_config 字段。 这可以通过 LangGraph Studio UI 访问。

Other

请参阅 configuration.py 中的字段以了解各种其他设置，以自定义 Open Deep Research 的行为。

📊 评价

Open Deep Research 配置为使用 Deep Research Bench 进行评估。 该基准包含 100 项博士级研究任务（5​​0 项英语、50 项中文），由 22 个领域（例如科学与技术、商业与金融）的领域专家精心设计，以反映现实世界的深度研究需求。 它有 2 个评估指标，但排行榜是基于 RACE 分数的。 它使用法学硕士作为法官（Gemini）根据专家根据一组指标编制的一组黄金报告来评估研究报告。

Usage

警告：运行 100 个示例可能会花费约 20-100 美元，具体取决于模型选择。

该数据集可通过此链接在 LangSmith 上获取。 要开始评估，请运行以下命令：

# Run comprehensive evaluation on LangSmith datasets
python tests/run_evaluate.py

这将提供一个指向 LangSmith 实验的链接，该实验的名称为 YOUR_EXPERIMENT_NAME。 完成此操作后，将结果提取到可以提交到深度研究台的 JSONL 文件。

python tests/extract_langsmith_data.py --project-name "YOUR_EXPERIMENT_NAME" --model-name "you-model-name" --dataset-name "deep_research_bench"

这将创建具有所需格式的tests/expt_results/deep_research_bench_model-name.jsonl。 将生成的 JSONL 文件移至 Deep Research Bench 存储库的本地克隆，并按照其快速入门指南进行评估提交。

结果

Name 犯罪 总结 研究 压缩 总成本 代币总数 比赛成绩 实验
GPT-5 ca3951d 打开：gpt-4.1-mini 开放：gpt-5 打开：gpt-4.1 204,640,896 0.4943 Link
默认值 6532a41 打开：gpt-4.1-mini 打开：gpt-4.1 打开：gpt-4.1 $45.98 58,015,332 0.4309 Link
克劳德十四行诗 4 f877ea9 打开：gpt-4.1-mini 人类：克劳德十四行诗-4-20250514 打开：gpt-4.1 $187.09 138,917,050 0.4401 Link
深度研究工作台提交 c0a160b 打开：gpt-4.1-nano 打开：gpt-4.1 打开：gpt-4.1 $87.83 207,005,549 0.4344 Link

🚀 部署和使用

LangGraph工作室

按照快速入门在本地启动 LangGraph 服务器并在 LangGraph Studio 上测试代理。

托管部署

您可以轻松部署到 LangGraph 平台。

开放代理平台

开放代理平台 (OAP) 是一个 UI，非技术用户可以从中构建和配置自己的代理。 OAP 非常适合允许用户使用最适合他们的需求和想要解决的问题的不同 MCP 工具和搜索 API 来配置 Deep Researcher。

我们已将 Open Deep Research 部署到 OAP 的公共演示实例中。 您所需要做的就是添加您的 API 密钥，然后您就可以亲自测试 Deep Researcher！ 在这里尝试一下

您还可以部署您自己的 OAP 实例，并为您的用户提供您自己的自定义代理（如 Deep Researcher）。

  1. 部署开放代理平台
  2. 将 Deep Researcher 添加到 OAP

遗留实施🏛️

src/legacy/ 文件夹包含两个早期的实现，它们提供了自动化研究的替代方法。 它们的性能不如当前的实现，但提供了理解深度研究的不同方法的替代想法。

1. 工作流程实施（legacy/graph.py）

  • 规划和执行：具有人机参与规划的结构化工作流程
  • 顺序处理：通过反射逐个创建部分
  • 交互控制：允许反馈和批准报告计划
  • 注重质量：通过迭代细化强调准确性

2. 多代理实现 (legacy/multi_agent.py)

  • 主管-研究员架构：协调的多智能体系统
  • 并行处理：多个研究人员同时工作
  • 速度优化：通过并发更快地生成报告
  • MCP 支持：广泛的模型上下文协议集成
